headline: BAB
notes: Crypto low-vol/BAB, top-15 perps full-2022 history, weekly rebal, 5bp/leg (~6 legs/yr, ~31bp drag - turnover-feasible). Headline=BAB (IS-selected lookback 90d / bwin 90d, AT GRID BOUNDARY). OOS Sharpe=1.31 ret=18.5%/yr vol=14.1% PSR=0.97 DSR=0.94 (n=652). LOWVOL hedged Sharpe=0.93/PSR=0.90; BAB Sharpe=1.31/PSR=0.97. Genuinely market-neutral (beta-stripped OOS alpha Sharpe still 1.31, residual OOS beta~0.03). KEY FINDING: the ENTIRE return is the SHORT high-beta/high-vol leg (short 19%/yr) - the LONG low-vol leg earned ~-0%/yr. So this is really 'short high-vol alts' (AVAX/LINK/DOGE/ADA/SOL underperformed hard in the 2024-09->2026 OOS bull), the lottery-ticket half of the anomaly, not a low-vol PREMIUM. FRAGILE: Sharpe decays monotonically 1.31->0.63 as bwin 90->180d, single OOS regime, DSR=0.94<0.95. CAVEATS: delta-neutral close-to-close maxDD=-7.7% understates tail (no intrabar liq/gap; 14% vol so NOT near-zero-vol illusion); MATIC excluded (delisted 2024-09) -> mild survivorship. VERDICT MARGINAL: real cross-sectional effect, PSR>0.95, but DSR<0.95, one-sided/regime-concentrated, parameter-fragile -> not a deployable EDGE.
